top_signals.title: Spring 2026 Economic Forecast shows slowdown in growth as energy shock drives up inflation
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 21 May 2026 The Spring 2026 Economic Forecast projects weaker economic activity, as the conflict in the Middle East triggers a new energy shock that reignites inflation and shakes economic sentiment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pimco’s Ivascyn Says Fed Will Act on Inflation as Yields Spike - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Pimco’s Ivascyn Says Fed Will Act on Inflation as Yields Spike  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Germany touts pan-German space command amid European push to supplant US tech
top_signals.summary: Austria’s Defense Minister Claudia Tanner reaffirmed that Austria plans to put three operationally designated military satellites into orbit next year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Polymarket is said to seek Japan market approval in global push
top_signals.summary: Polymarket enables users to bet on the outcomes of real-world events, such as elections, using cryptocurrencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Speech by Commissioner Albuquerque at the European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA) conference: A new era for EU capital markets
top_signals.summary:
